title: MCD: Illusioner
description: Modifies the Illusioner's behavior to be that of MCD, and lets it spawn naturally too.
body:
The Illusioner can now spawn in raids, a wave after the first evoker spawns. It can also spawn in woodland mansions.
## Its behavior is also different:
- The Illusioner no longer goes invisible, instead summoning 4 clones that can all shoot you and deal damage. 
- It drops arrows, and a totem of undying upon death. 
- The clones vanish on damage taken, including from the Illusioner or its other clones.
